programs.title: The Front Bar
programs.desc: Join Sam Pang, Mick Molloy and Andy Maher as they share a laugh about the world of AFL and catch up with stars of yesteryear and today.

programs.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programs.desc: Troy and Pickle attempt to track down a giant python known as the Night Serpent. Meanwhile, Tess convinces Bill to try out new hunting grounds.

programs.title: Desert Collectors
programs.desc: Join The Desert Collectors as they travel the spectacular outback scenery steeped in history and heritage in search of unique treasures and meet the people who spend their lives collecting them.
